title: chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. psilocarpus
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. psilocarpus, also known as narrowleaf chamise or psilocarphus, is a shrub native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. psilocarpus contribute to various health benefits, including immune system support, wound healing, and relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal and herbal uses.
